Home / About Us

Shaping the Future of
Global Construction

Founded in 2019 by Fuad Sweiss to improve and perfect modular building technologies through global partnerships.

View Our Work Our Services
Our Purpose

Creating jobs and affordable housing through modular innovation worldwide

GMP's mission is to create jobs in underserved areas and provide affordable housing worldwide — reducing project costs, delivering in shorter timeframes, reducing waste of materials, improving the quality of construction, reducing site disruption, improving worker safety, and minimizing carbon emissions from construction projects.

Innovation

Advancing modular methods and digital delivery.

Integrity

Transparent partnerships and accountable execution.

Excellence

Rigorous quality in design, manufacturing, and field work.

Sustainability

Responsible materials, efficiency, and lifecycle thinking.

Compliance

Meeting and exceeding regulatory and client standards.

Impact

Outcomes that strengthen communities and critical infrastructure.

Portfolio

Subsidiaries & partners integrated across every discipline

Integrated capabilities across construction, manufacturing, emergency systems, and healthcare delivery.

Agbayani Construction

General contracting across modular and civil construction programs.

  • Commercial & Residential Modular
  • Civil Infrastructure
  • Design-Build Services

RI Group USA

International modular construction expertise and manufacturing partnerships.

  • Modular Manufacturing
  • International Supply Chain
  • Quality Assurance

EDIS USA

Early warning systems and disaster preparedness technology for emergency management agencies.

  • Early Warning Systems
  • Disaster Preparedness
  • Emergency Management Technology
External Partner

HWB — Hospitals Without Borders

Humanitarian healthcare facilities, telemedicine, and rapid-deployment clinical infrastructure.

  • Healthcare Facilities
  • Telemedicine
  • Humanitarian
Team

Leadership guiding strategy and execution

Seasoned executives guiding strategy, operations, and financial performance.

Fuad Sweiss

Founder & CEO

Founded GMP in 2019 to advance modular construction globally

Governance

Strategic oversight spanning development, healthcare, defense, and international relations.

Heritage

Our timeline from founding to today

Key milestones from founding through today's programs and partnerships.

2019

GMP founded by Fuad Sweiss in the San Francisco Bay Area

2020

Agbayani Construction partnership established

2021

RI Group USA collaboration launched

2022

Irvine, CA office opened for Southern California operations

2023

HWB healthcare partnership initiated

2024

Trade partner network expanded to 10+ firms

2025

28-Day ADU program introduced

2017 Innovation Award
2019 Sustainability Excellence
2021 Top Construction Partner
2023 Best Government Contractor
2025 Industry Leader Recognition

From modular delivery and manufacturing partnerships to mission-critical programs, explore how GMP aligns capabilities with complex project requirements.
